info.name: Microsoft Exchange Microsoft Graph People API

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of results to return

params.name: $skip
params.description: Number of results to skip (not supported with $search)

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include

params.name: $orderby
params.description: Property to sort by (default is relevance)

params.name: $search
params.description: Search for people by name or alias. Supports fuzzy matching and the topic keyword to find people based on topics extracted from email conversations.

items.docs: Retrieve a collection of person objects ordered by their relevance to the signed-in user, which is determined by the user's communication and collaboration patterns, and business relationships. People can be local contacts, contacts from social networking or the organization's directory, and people from recent communications such as email.

params.name: user-id
params.description: The unique identifier or user principal name of the user

params.name: $top
params.description: Maximum number of results to return

params.name: $skip
params.description: Number of results to skip (not supported with $search)

params.name: $select
params.description: Comma-separated list of properties to include

items.docs: Retrieve a collection of person objects ordered by their relevance to the specified user. Requires People.Read.All permission. Useful for scenarios where an application needs to retrieve relevant people for a user other than the signed-in user.
